mapper.insert: insert into book_info_history (book_id, change_type, before_data, after_data, change_fields, change_reason, source_order_no, source_type, staff_id, staff_name, created_at) values (#{bookId}, #{changeType}, #{beforeData}, #{afterData}, #{changeFields}, #{changeReason}, #{sourceOrderNo}, #{sourceType}, #{staffId}, #{staffName}, now())
